llm_verdict.message:
<function=review_plan>
<parameter=plan_description>Plan to modify /etc/issue to replace the default text with a compliant login banner message per local site policy.</parameter>
</function>
<function=read_file>
<parameter=path>/etc/issue</parameter>
</function>
<function=write_file>
<parameter=path>/etc/issue</parameter>
<parameter=content>Authorized use only. Unauthorized access is prohibited.</parameter>
<parameter=mode>w</parameter>
</function>
<function=run_cmd>
<parameter=command>cat /etc/issue</parameter>
</function>
